caption: Run this before you spend another dollar on ads. Have a friend call your main line three times this week: Tuesday at 2pm, Friday at 6pm, Sunday at 11am. Let it ring through if nobody picks up, then watch what happens next. Most shops handle the Tuesday call fine. Almost none handle Friday night or Sunday morning, because that's when the owner is off the clock and the lead just sits there. A missed-call text-back system doesn't take weekends off. It fires an automatic text the second a call goes unanswered, any hour, any day, with a link to book. Research on lead response time found that contacting a lead within an hour makes you 7 times more likely to reach them than waiting even one hour longer, and 60 times more likely than waiting a full day. Your slowest response time is your real response time. Want a missed-call recovery system running in your business? DM "MISSED". #ServiceBusiness #HomeServices #LeadGeneration #SmallBusinessGrowth #MissedCallRecovery
rationale: Reels are still winning reach, and a direct, hook-first format stands out against the last few posts. This gives owners a test they can actually run this week, with a real, citable stat instead of a soft claim, and ends on the exact moment they lose money: nights and weekends.
